rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Impacket WMIExec.py Execution (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Impacket WMIExec.py Execution (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 26d79902-98ac-43f8-b669-99486e2b5126
status: experimental
description: Detects execution from Impacket's wmiexec.py. Part of the RedCanary 2023
  Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/impacket/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.s0357
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \wmiprvse.exe
    Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
    CommandLine|re: (?i)cmd.exe \/Q \/c .*\\\\127.0.0.1\\ADMIN\$\\__[0-9]{1,10}\.[0-9]{1,10}
      2>&1
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
